name: irisk-get-scan-results

outputs.description: Query status. C2sec.Domain.application.Domain The domain name being queried.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.application.result

outputs.description: Details about the application being checked. C2sec.Domain.application.data.info Information regarding the data being processed.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.application.data.appdetail

outputs.description: Website address being processed. C2sec.Domain.credential.result Query status.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.application.data.website

outputs.description: The domain name being queried. C2sec.Domain.credential.data.user User name.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.credential.Domain

outputs.description: The domain name being queried. C2sec.Domain.network.data.firewall Firewall status.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.network.Domain

outputs.description: Name of the user. C2sec.Domain.network.data.service Name of the service being used.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.network.data.Name

outputs.description: Name of the protocol being used. C2sec.Domain.network.data.state State of the network application (“open” or “closed”).
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.network.data.protocol
